summary: CRITICAL FAILURES: (1) No test files provided despite explicit TDD requirement. Workflow excludes 'tests/workflow.test.ts' which doesn't exist — missing entire test harness to drive `act`. (2) No `act-result.txt` created or demonstrated. (3) Task requires actionlint validation; none provided. (4) `actions/checkout@v4` not pinned to full commit SHA (security requirement). (5) No rules.json or fixture files for validation. TypeScript code is well-written (good error handling, explicit types, clear structure) but deliverable is incomplete: tests, test harness, act validation, and test artifacts are all missing. Would fail on requirements 1–5 from task specification.
